rationale: Re-assert both runs' `forall|i|` ensures with explicit triggers so z3 instantiates them in lockstep, then case-split on `i == index`: at the index, the per-field `=~=` ensures pin every Page field on both posts (via pre_self_ or `mapping`), and off-index the re-asserted forall gives equality through pre_self_. Close with Seq extensionality (`=~=`) to lift pointwise Page equality to whole-`page_array@` equality; the remaining PageAllocator fields are already `==` to pre_self_'s via the ensures, so the two posts agree transitively.
